steps.title: Use what a box plot shows
steps.content: A box plot shows the median as the line inside the box. It does not give enough information to determine the mean.

steps.title: Compare the medians
steps.content: From the box plots, group $1$ has median mass $25$ kilograms, and group $2$ has median mass $24$ kilograms. Since $25>24$, group $1$ has the greater median mass.

steps.title: Choose the true statement
steps.content: The statement that must be true is that the median mass of group $1$ is greater than the median mass of group $2$. The answer is C.
